  • Changelog

    Report Index

    05_report-index.Rmd

    This vignette is a single-page reference for every analysis module in the correlates_reporting2 pipeline supported by utilrep2. Each row links to the module vignette and shows the runner function and the key trials.

    Correlates of Risk (CoR)

    These modules analyse the association between immune marker levels and disease risk in the vaccinated population.

    Module Purpose Runner function Vignette
    cor_coxph Cox PH models: hazard ratios, forest plots, marginalized risk curves run_cor_coxph() vignette("module-cor-coxph")
    cor_graphical Violin/scatter plots, weighted RCDF curves with VE lines run_cor_graphical() vignette("module-cor-graphical")
    cor_tabular GMT, GMR, and response-rate tables by CoR timepoint run_cor_tabular() vignette("module-cor-tabular")
    cor_threshold Parametric threshold regression: minimum marker level for VE run_cor_threshold() vignette("module-cor-threshold")
    cor_npthreshold Nonparametric TMLE threshold analysis run_cor_npthreshold() vignette("module-cor-npthreshold")
    cor_nonlinear Spline-based dose-response models via Super Learner run_cor_nonlinear() vignette("module-cor-nonlinear")
    cor_logistic Logistic regression for binary endpoints (HPV trials) run_cor_logistic() vignette("module-cor-logistic")
    cor_poisson Poisson regression for count endpoints (ILIAD trial) run_cor_poisson() vignette("module-cor-poisson")
    cor_surrogates CV-SL variable importance to identify optimal surrogates run_cor_surrogates() vignette("module-cor-surrogates")

    Full CoR pipeline: run_cor_analysis() runs tabular → coxph → graphical → nonlinear in sequence. See vignette("running-pipelines") for details.

    Correlates of Protection (CoP)

    These modules estimate vaccine efficacy as a function of immune marker levels using causal inference and principal stratification frameworks.

    Module Purpose Runner function Vignette
    cop_contrisk Controlled risk curves (Cox and NP) for VaxArt mock run_cop_contrisk() vignette("module-cop-contrisk")
    cop_stochastic Stochastic interventional VE as a function of marker run_cop_stochastic() vignette("module-cop-stochastic")
    cop_mediation Proportion of VE mediated by a candidate biomarker run_cop_mediation() vignette("module-cop-mediation")
    cop_binaryprinstrat Binary principal stratification VE within latent strata run_cop_binaryprinstrat() vignette("module-cop-binaryprinstrat")

    Full CoP pipeline: run_cop_analysis() runs contrisk → stochastic → mediation in sequence. See vignette("running-pipelines") for details.

    Immunogenicity

    These modules characterise vaccine immunogenicity independent of disease outcome, producing geometric mean titres, response rates, and distribution plots.

    Module Purpose Runner function Vignette
    immuno_tabular GMT, GMR, and response-rate tables by arm and serostatus run_immuno_tabular() vignette("module-immuno-tabular")
    immuno_graphical Violin plots, two-phase scatter, demographic-stratified figures run_immuno_graphical() vignette("module-immuno-graphical")
    cumulative_incidence Covariate-adjusted cumulative incidence and VE over time run_cumulative_incidence() vignette("module-immuno-cumulative-incidence")

    Full immunogenicity pipeline: run_immuno_analysis() runs tabular then graphical. See vignette("running-pipelines") for details.

    Trial coverage

    The table below summarises which trials are supported across the three analysis families. A ✔ indicates at least one module in that family runs scripts for that trial.

    Trial CoR CoP Immunogenicity
    moderna_mock / moderna_real ✔ ✔ ✔
    janssen_pooled_mock / _EUA / _partA ✔ ✔ ✔
    janssen_na_* / janssen_la_* / janssen_sa_* ✔ ✔ ✔
    hvtn705 / hvtn705V1V2 / hvtn705second ✔ ✔ ✔
    prevent19 / prevent19nvx / prevent19_stage2 ✔ ✔
    azd1222 / azd1222_bAb / azd1222_stage2 ✔ ✔
    nvx_uk302 ✔ ✔
    profiscov / profiscov_lvmn ✔ ✔
    vat08_combined / vat08m_naive / vat08m_nonnaive ✔ ✔ ✔
    covail / covail_sanofi / covail_tcell / covail_frnt ✔ ✔
    nextgen_mock ✔ ✔ ✔
    id27hpv / id27hpvnAb ✔ ✔
    iliad_ib202p ✔ ✔
    cov2008_tcell ✔
    janssen_partA_VL ✔ ✔

    Incomplete / placeholder modules

    The following modules exist in the correlates_reporting2 repository but have no working analysis code yet. They are listed here for completeness; no run_*() functions or vignettes exist for them.

    Module Status
    cop_prinstrat Stub — report.Rmd contains only “TO FILL IN”
    cop_exposureproximal Placeholder — contains helper functions only
    cop_proximalstochastic Reference materials only (paper PDFs, simulation data)

    Quick reference 

    library(utilrep2)

# List all exported run_* functions
ls("package:utilrep2", pattern = "^run_")

# Check session configuration
session_status()

    See vignette("getting-started") for session setup and vignette("running-pipelines") for full pipeline orchestration.

    Developed by Y H.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
